name: Tauri Updater
description: Official auto-update plugin for Tauri apps with signed release verification across Windows, macOS, and Linux.

seo.title: Tauri Updater — CI/CD for Applications
seo.meta_description: Tauri Updater: Official auto-update plugin for Tauri apps with signed release verification across Windows, macOS, and Linux.

when_to_use: Signed auto-update delivery for Tauri desktop apps
Custom update server integration for enterprise deploys
Delta update support minimizing download sizes

pros: Official updater, kept in sync with Tauri releases
Signed release verification across all three OSes
Minimal config for the common case
Tiny runtime footprint compared to Electron
cons: Feature set still narrower than Sparkle on macOS
Tied to Tauri's own release workflow
review.verdict: The obvious auto-updater choice for Tauri apps — not yet as mature as Sparkle for nuanced needs.
review.best_for: Tauri apps wanting one updater across Windows, macOS, and Linux.
review.not_for: Apps needing phased rollouts, delta updates, or Sparkle-level maturity.
